introSection: Crazy Caterpillar was a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Pinfari previously located at Tir Prince Fun Park in Towyn, Gwynedd, Wales, UK.
fullText:
Crazy Caterpillar was a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Pinfari previously located at Tir Prince Fun Park in Towyn, Gwynedd, Wales, UK.

Standard Wacky Worm layout.
